summary: Complete testing of PDF report generation feature for GreenLink Agritech cooperative. Both EUDR and Carbon PDF endpoints return valid PDF files. Frontend buttons work correctly and trigger downloads.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF endpoints properly require authentication (return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
Both PDF endpoints return proper Content-Type: application/pdf header
Content-Disposition header includes 'attachment' with proper filename
PDF files start with valid %PDF magic bytes
data-testid attributes present on PDF buttons for easy testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Both PDF download buttons work correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing cooperative COOP-GAGNOA (code CI-GAG-001)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF report generation fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/cooperative/reports/eudr/pdf and GET /api/cooperative/reports/carbon/pdf both return valid PDFs. Frontend ReportsPage.jsx has working download buttons with data-testid='export-eudr-pdf-btn' and data-testid='export-carbon-pdf-btn'. Uses cooperativeApi.downloadEUDRPdf() and cooperativeApi.downloadCarbonPdf() functions.

backend_apis.GET /api/cooperative/reports/eudr/pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF (application/pdf), proper filename (rapport_eudr_*.pdf)
backend_apis.GET /api/cooperative/reports/carbon/pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF (application/pdf), proper filename (rapport_carbone_*.pdf)
backend_apis.GET /api/cooperative/reports/eudr: PASS - Returns JSON with compliance data

frontend_page.cooperative_info: PASS - Shows COOP-GAGNOA (CI-GAG-001) with certifications (Rainforest Alliance, UTZ Certified)
frontend_page.compliance_section: PASS - Shows 100% compliance rate, 0% geolocation (0/0 parcelles)
frontend_page.statistics_section: PASS - Shows 7 members, 0 hectares, 0 Tonnes CO2, 0/10 Score
frontend_page.village_breakdown: PASS - Shows 7 villages (Issia, Oume, Sinfra, Oumé, Daloa, Lakota, Gagnoa Centre)
frontend_page.eudr_pdf_button: PASS - Button visible, clickable, triggers download
frontend_page.carbon_pdf_button: PASS - Button visible, clickable, triggers download

mocked_apis_confirmed: Orange Money Business API (for payments - not tested in this iteration)

playwright_tests: Verify page content and data-testid attributes
